title: Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited:
Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited!
